sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Ship Speed Control
special_mechanics.description: Player's ship has adjustable speed setting across four levels, can be increased or decreased at player discretion

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Selectable weapons (Twin shot, Back shot, and others). On default difficulty, only current weapon is lost on destruction. CLAWs (auxiliary units) auto-acquire maximum of two and mimic ship weapon fire.

special_mechanics.name: Horizontal Scrolling Flight
special_mechanics.description: Horizontally scrolling stage format (changed from previous game's free-directional overhead format)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Thunder Spirits is a shmup (scrolling shooter) with no documented traditional platformer physics parameters (jump, gravity, walking). Game focuses on ship flight mechanics with adjustable speed control. Movement parameters are not applicable to this genre.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Thunder Force III (covers Thunder Spirits SNES port details)
